---
title: "Trabalho Final"
format: html
---

## Quarto

``` {R}
data <- read.csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mauricioaraujj/Pan_African_Trials_Network/refs/heads/main/data/data.csv', sep = ';')
data <- data |> subset(data$COUNTRY == "Malawi")

data <- data %>%    mutate(
  env = as.factor(env),
  gen = as.factor(gen),
  bloco = as.factor(rep),
  check = as.factor(check),
  SEASON= as.factor(SEASON),
  YEAR= as.factor(YEAR),
  loc = as.factor(loc),
  RAINFED = as.factor(RAINFED),
  
  GY = as.numeric(GY),
  NDM = as.numeric(NDM),
  PROT = as.numeric(PROT),
  
)

```
Retirada de valores sem sentido
```{R}
#valor negativo
data$GY[data$GY < 0] <- NA
visual = subset(data, GY > 8000)


```
